creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to guyyur from comment #2)
> The issue is ncurses (non-w) lib is not listed in _LIBRARIES in
> src.libnames.mk
> _LIBRARIES was added in r274984.

I wanted to refer to the same post in ML, but Guy replied first.

Thanks a lot for this comment and analysis of the problem as well!
